description: Perform a keyword cannibalization audit on https://books.toscrape.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Identify and export all pages with duplicate page titles to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/duplicate_titles.csv and pages with duplicate H1 tags to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/duplicate_h1s.csv. Analyze these findings and provide a report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/cannibalization_report.txt. The report must include the total number of pages crawled, the counts of duplicate titles and H1s found, identification of the top 3 most-duplicated titles, and specific recommendations for remediation.
